name: The Brothers' War

draft.notes: Plus 1 retro-artifact slot: 10 commons + 3 uncommons + 1 rare + 1 retro artifact + ad card; a basic land appears only in some packs (displacing a common), and lands and foils never appear in the same pack. If a foil appears it displaces a common (becomes 9 commons). Only the Japanese printing is detailed on the page. [Refined: retro-artifact slot (set BRR) replaces the sometimes-present basic land; pack totals 15.]

statedRates: Foil 1:45 cards. Retro-artifact slot: uncommon ~66%, rare ~27%, mythic ~7%; schematic version ~1/6 independent of rarity. Marketing card: DFC helper ~1/5, punch-out counter ~1/8.
sourceNotes: Large set: 6 DFC mythics. Additional 63 retro artifacts (18 uncommon, 30 rare, 15 mythic) available in the dedicated retro-artifact slot. Page only documents the Japanese printing (US/Belgian not detailed). 36 packs per box. Retro-artifact slot is an extra slot beyond the standard 14 game cards; full pack listed as ad + retro + rare + 3 unc + 10 com (16 cards incl. ad).
